changes: Expanded Command compact_timeline to include continuation_contract_reason and exact_next_action.
Added closure validation that rejects compact timelines missing the continuation reason or exact next action.
Added regression coverage for stale compact timeline reason/action removal.
Updated production readiness to assert compact timeline reason/action containment for generated and lease-resume Command readbacks.
Regenerated the lease-resume Command readback fixture and updated final synthesis wording.
